---
title: "News"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: news          # all posts in the news/ folder
  type: default           # blog-style list; shows a thumbnail when a post has one
  sort: "date desc"
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
  fields: [image, date, title, description]   # posts without an image just show text (no placeholder)
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true              # generates an RSS feed
---
